Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The task is to merge Log A and Log B into a single integrated event log

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: I think the 2 second difference between the Order Received events A at 10 00 00Z and B at 09 59 58Z is right at the edge of the tolerance you mentioned so Id treat them as the same event and merge them

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: For the other matches the timing 1 second offset for Order Validated and the 2 second offset for Item Shipped both fall comfortably inside the a few seconds window so those should merge cleanly too
